text: The substitution-required subset (12.8% of named haves, e-0033/a-0032) does NOT break the rough-is-more-compressed assumption the length-confound design rests on. Reference multiplicity is mild (median 1.0, mean 1.22, max 4; only 19.4% of the subset have >=2 rewrite sites). For a SOUND pi_root inliner that duplicates the body at each use site, only 20/2225 (0.90%) of named substantive haves invert compression direction (pi_root becomes longer), net root-leaf delta median -25 char, worst case +75 char. So pi_root stays the shorter policy for ~99% of haves and the +173-char header-delta survives; q-0008's length covariate need only absorb a small bounded opposite-sign tail on the 12.8% subset. (Lower bound: sibling refs only; deep main bodies elided.)
